Decompiled · Dresden · 2024

Adding security to your architecture and mindset

Decompiled · Dresden · 2024 Event Full article & transcript View slides

It's easy to make security an all-or-nothing approach. Many architectures thrive in delivering the perfect product vision while others attempt to deliver something quickly. Often what gets lost is attention to security in a race to deliver the best architecture for the best product.

© Warren Parad
